- Most pages are read-only; only the rating widget and submit form need interactivity

namespace RecipeShare.Models;

public class Recipe
{
    public int Id { get; set; }
    public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Category { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Ingredients { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Steps { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int TotalRating { get; set; }
    public int RatingCount { get; set; }
    public double AverageRating => RatingCount > 0 ? (double)TotalRating / RatingCount : 0;
}

public class RecipeSubmission
{
    public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Category { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Ingredients { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Steps { get; set; } = string.Empty;
}

public static class RecipeStore
{
    private static readonly List<Recipe> _recipes = new()
    {
        new Recipe { Id = 1, Title = "Classic Margherita Pizza", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Pizza dough
San Marzano tomatoes
Fresh mozzarella
Fresh basil
Olive oil
Salt", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 475°F
2. Roll out dough into a circle
3. Spread crushed tomatoes over dough
4. Add torn mozzarella pieces
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes
6. Top with fresh basil and drizzle olive oil" },
        new Recipe { Id = 2, Title = "Spaghetti Carbonara", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Spaghetti
Guanciale
Egg yolks
Pecorino Romano
Black pepper", Steps = "1. Cook spaghetti in salted water
2. Crisp guanciale in a pan
3. Whisk yolks with grated pecorino and pepper
4. Toss hot pasta with guanciale
5. Remove from heat and stir in egg mixture
6. Serve immediately with extra pecorino" },
        new Recipe { Id = 3, Title = "Chicken Tikka Masala", Category = "Indian", Ingredients = "Chicken thighs
Yogurt
Garam masala
Turmeric
Crushed tomatoes
Heavy cream
Garlic
Ginger", Steps = "1. Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours
2. Grill or broil chicken until charred
3. Sauté garlic and ginger in butter
4. Add crushed tomatoes and simmer
5. Stir in cream and garam masala
6. Add chicken pieces and simmer 10 minutes" },
        new Recipe { Id = 4, Title = "Vegetable Pad Thai", Category = "Asian", Ingredients = "Rice noodles
Tofu
Bean sprouts
Scallions
Peanuts
Tamarind paste
Fish sauce
Lime", Steps = "1. Soak rice noodles in warm water
2. Press and cube tofu, then pan-fry until golden
3. Make sauce with tamarind, fish sauce, and sugar
4. Stir-fry noodles with sauce
5. Add tofu and bean sprouts
6. Garnish with peanuts, scallions, and lime" },
        new Recipe { Id = 5, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Ground beef
Taco seasoning
Corn tortillas
Lettuce
Tomato
Cheddar cheese
Sour cream
Salsa", Steps = "1. Brown ground beef in a skillet
2. Add taco seasoning and water, simmer
3. Warm tortillas in a dry pan
4. Assemble tacos with beef and toppings
5. Serve with salsa and sour cream" },
        new Recipe { Id = 6, Title = "Guacamole", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Avocados
Lime juice
Cilantro
Red onion
Jalapeño
Tomato
Salt", Steps = "1. Halve and pit avocados
2. Mash avocado to desired consistency
3. Stir in diced onion, jalapeño, and tomato
4. Add lime juice and chopped cilantro
5. Season with salt to taste
6. Serve immediately with tortilla chips" },
        new Recipe { Id = 7, Title = "Miso Soup", Category = "Asian", Ingredients = "Dashi stock
White miso paste
Silken tofu
Wakame seaweed
Scallions", Steps = "1. Bring dashi to a gentle simmer
2. Rehydrate wakame in water
3. Cube silken tofu
4. Remove dashi from heat
5. Whisk in miso paste until dissolved
6. Add tofu and wakame, garnish with scallions" },
        new Recipe { Id = 8, Title = "Chocolate Lava Cake", Category = "Desserts", Ingredients = "Dark chocolate
Butter
Eggs
Sugar
Flour
Vanilla extract", Steps = "1. Melt chocolate and butter together
2. Whisk eggs and sugar until thick
3. Fold chocolate mixture into eggs
4. Add flour and vanilla
5. Pour into greased ramekins
6. Bake at 425°F for 12-14 minutes
7. Invert onto plates and serve immediately" },
    };

    private static int _nextId = 9;

    public static IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetAll() => _recipes.AsReadOnly();

    public static IEnumerable<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category) =>
        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

    public static Recipe? GetById(int id) => _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);

    public static IEnumerable<string> GetCategories() =>
        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct();

    public static void AddRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
    {
        _recipes.Add(new Recipe
        {
            Id = _nextId++,
            Title = submission.Title,
            Category = submission.Category,
            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients,
            Steps = submission.Steps
        });
    }

    public static void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
    {
        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
        if (recipe is not null && stars >= 1 && stars <= 5)
        {
            recipe.TotalRating += stars;
            recipe.RatingCount++;
        }
    }
}

@page "/" RecipeShare - Home

🍳 RecipeShare

Discover and share delicious recipes from around the world

Browse by Category

@foreach (var category in RecipeStore.GetCategories()) {

@GetCategoryEmoji(category) @category

@RecipeStore.GetByCategory(category).Count() recipes

Browse
}
📝 Submit a Recipe
@code { private static string GetCategoryEmoji(string category) => category switch { "Italian" => "🍝", "Indian" => "🍛", "Asian" => "🥢", "Mexican" => "🌮", "Desserts" => "🍰", _ => "🍽️" }; }

@page "/submit" @rendermode InteractiveServer Submit a Recipe - RecipeShare
  1. Home
  2. Submit Recipe

📝 Submit a Recipe

Share your favorite recipe with the community!

@if (_submitted) {

Recipe submitted successfully!

Your recipe "@_model.Title" is now live.

Back to Home
} else {
Enter one ingredient per line.
Number your steps for clarity.
 }
@code { private RecipeSubmission _model = new(); private bool _submitted; private void HandleSubmit() { if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_model.Title) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_model.Category) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_model.Ingredients) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_model.Steps)) { return; } RecipeStore.AddRecipe(_model); _submitted = true; } }

data.content:
Build succeeded with zero errors. Here's a summary of the project:

**Project created:** `RecipeShare/` — a Blazor Web App (.NET 11, Interactive Server mode)

**Architecture:**
- **Static SSR** (default) for read-only pages — Homepage, Category browse, Recipe detail
- **Interactive Server** only where needed — the `StarRating` component and the `SubmitRecipe` page

**Pages & Components:**
| Route | Purpose | Render Mode |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `/` | Homepage with category cards | Static SSR |
| `/category/{name}` | Recipes list for a category | Static SSR |
| `/recipe/{id}` | Recipe detail (ingredients + steps) | Static SSR |
| `/submit` | Submit recipe form | Interactive Server |
| `StarRating` (embedded) | Click-to-rate 1–5 stars | Interactive Server |

**Data:** In-memory `RecipeStore` with 8 seed recipes across 5 categories (Italian, Indian, Asian, Mexican, Desserts).

Run with `cd RecipeShare && dotnet run`.
